title: viola × rossii
intro: Viola × rossii, also known as the hybrid pansy or pansy viola, is a hybrid plant that is a cross between Viola x wittrockiana and Viola sororia, belonging to the violet family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Viola × rossii include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress, improve mood, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
